productDisplayName: Puma Men Faas 500 Black Casual Shoes
description: The Faas 500 shoes from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. Inspired by old school running trainers, these shoes look great when teamed with casual wear.  UpperMesh upper with synthetic suede overlays for structure and breathabilityFormstripe on both sidesCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortLace-ups for snug FitMidsoleFull-length lateral groove in the midsole to reinforce stability throughout the gait cycleOrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleBioRide technology for a more natural and responsive rideEverRide technology to reduce weight and improve forefoot cushioningEverTrack used in the outsole for greater durability in high-wear areasRocker shape of outsole allows for natural stride with an effortless toe-offFlex grooves built across the waffle patterned outsole to enhance flexibilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
